steps.title: Compute the intercept
steps.content: This gives $y=23$, so the $y$-intercept is $(0,23)$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice C, $(0,23)$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C is correct.
